scripts.dev:final: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); if (fs.existsSync('.env')) fs.copyFileSync('.env', 'apps/web-final/.env.local')" && npm run dev --workspace web-final -- --port 3002
scripts.build:final: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); if (fs.existsSync('.env')) fs.copyFileSync('.env', 'apps/web-final/.env.local')" && npm run build --workspace web-final
